rows.q: In the fiscal year that Microsoft's total revenue was closest to $200 billion, what total revenue did Alphabet (Google) report?
rows.answer_head: In the fiscal year 2022, Microsoft's total revenue was $198,270 million, which is the closest to $200 billion among the fiscal years reported [Source: 000095017
